title: Menu bar integration for meeting mode
description: Add Start/Stop Meeting Notes to the menu bar dropdown. Show recording duration. Indicate when meeting mode is active (different icon color or indicator).

title: Detect BlackHole and guide setup
description: Check if BlackHole 2ch is installed via hs.audiodevice.findInputByName('BlackHole 2ch'). If not, show instructions to install (brew install blackhole-2ch) and set up Multi-Output Device in Audio MIDI Setup. Include step-by-step dialog.

title: Floating notepad window
description: Create a floating hs.webview notepad that opens during meeting recording. HTML textarea with JS-to-Lua messaging. User can type notes alongside the transcription. Resizable, stays on top.

title: Meeting summary via Ollama
description: After recording stops, combine the full transcript with user notes. Send to Ollama for summarization (may need chunking for long meetings). Save to ~/.local-whisper/meetings/YYYY-MM-DD-HHmm.md as markdown with sections: Summary, Key Points, Action Items, Full Transcript, User Notes.

title: Incremental meeting transcription
description: Transcribe 30s audio chunks incrementally during recording using whisper.cpp with the user's chosen model (e.g. large-v3). Append each chunk's transcript to a running document. Show progress in notepad window.

title: Meeting recording via BlackHole
description: Add meeting recording that captures system audio from BlackHole device using ffmpeg with 30s segments. Use the user's chosen whisper model (not tiny). Start/stop from menu bar.

title: Meeting recording mode
description: Manual meeting recording mode: record system audio via BlackHole virtual audio driver, transcribe with whisper.cpp (user's chosen model, e.g. large-v3), show floating notepad for user notes, summarize with Ollama. Triggered from menu bar. All local, no cloud.
close_reason: All subtasks complete — meeting mode implemented

title: Continue meeting notes functionality
description: Inspect and continue the in-progress meeting notes functionality in hammerspoon/init.lua, including current UI, save/export behavior, and any missing integration work discovered during implementation.
